query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.isPremium,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM puzzle_attempts pa JOIN training_sets ts ON pa.trainingSetId = ts.id WHERE ts.userId = u.id) as attempt_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cycle_history ch WHERE ch.userId = u.id) as cycle_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM training_sets ts WHERE ts.userId = u.id) as set_count
FROM users u LIMIT 10;
command:

  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cycle_history ch WHERE ch.userId = u.id) as cycle_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM training_sets ts WHERE ts.userId = u.id) as set_count
FROM users u LIMIT 10;
